galaxy.name: Milky Way
galaxy.description: Our home galaxy containing the Solar System.

galaxy.name: Andromeda
galaxy.description: The nearest major galaxy to the Milky Way.

galaxy.name: Triangulum
galaxy.description: The third-largest member of the Local Group.

galaxy.name: Messier 87
galaxy.description: A supergiant elliptical galaxy with a massive black hole.

galaxy.name: Whirlpool Galaxy
galaxy.description: Famous for its well-defined spiral arms.
